g.text: A list of size 26 for count
We use two pointers both pointing at first element (0)
we start moving the right pointer towards right as long as
right - left + 1 - maxCount < k (where right-left+1 is the current
length of the current window). If k is smaller we just drop the
leftmost element in window (by decreasing it count) and move the
left pointer forward. We will keep repeating it till we reach
the end of iteration. We will check if the current maxCount is > ans
if it is we will update the ans with the maxCount.
3) max = 1, length - max = 2 = k (move left one step forward)
4) max = 2 (found two x), length - max = 1 < k
5) max = 2, length - max = 2 = k (move left one step froward)
6) max = 1 (moved the left pointer forward from first x
